description: An Amazon-style fulfillment center uses bcWebCam at pick stations where workers must see both the barcode scanner and their SAP EWM warehouse management system simultaneously. The bcWebCam window must be configured as an always-on-top overlay at 60% opacity (workers need to see the WMS list behind the scanner), with no terminating character after scans (the WMS processes raw scan data via its own protocol without any extra keystrokes), and a 1-second duplicate prevention to avoid double-picks on fast conveyor operations. The current configuration has Enter as the terminating character, full opacity (0.8), and no duplicate prevention. Reconfigure bcWebCam for this warehouse overlay workflow.
